en.extract:
The grey-collared oriole (Oriolus forsteni), or Seram oriole, is a species of bird in the family Oriolidae. It is endemic to Seram.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.

The '''grey-collared oriole''' ('''''Oriolus forsteni'''''), or '''Seram oriole''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Oriolidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Seram]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.
